custom.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
custom.transition: border 0.2s ease-in-out, background 0.2s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-in-out

tw: inline-block relative font-normal leading-tight border-0 visible cursor-text m-0 pt-1 pr-1.5 pb-1 pl-1.5
